scope: Independent adversarial verification of PostgreSQL checkpoint resume and stale-attempt repair; no product source or test was modified.

commands.command: uv run pytest -q tests/unit/test_persistence_orchestration.py tests/unit/test_pipeline_resilience.py tests/unit/test_retry.py tests/integration/test_postgres_resume.py
commands.output: 32 passed, 1 skipped in 0.31s (the integration module was intentionally skipped because this direct command has no disposable DB URL)

terminal_payload_vs_checkpoint.evidence: The real-PostgreSQL regression passed. It writes a terminal PipelineRun payload after stage 02 times out, then resumes with stage 01 skipped, last_price preserved from the checkpoint, and attempts [01/1 completed, 02/1 timed_out, 02/2 completed].

stale_running_attempt_exactly_once.evidence: The real-PostgreSQL process-recreation regression passed with [01/1 completed, 02/1 failed, 02/2 completed]. src/quantinue/db/postgres_query.py updates only status='running'; after finalization the same historical attempt cannot match a later resume. Repeated interruption therefore finalizes only the currently running attempt per claim.

cancel_resume.evidence: PipelineOrchestrator.run shields store.abandon in finally. The integration case raises KeyboardInterrupt, closes the first store, recreates it, then resumes from the durable checkpoint.

misleading_success_output.evidence: The runner exit code was captured separately after pytest (RUNNER_EXIT=0), rather than inferring success from dot output.

dirty_worktree.evidence: Pre-existing parent-repository status was ' M ../.gitignore' and '?? ./'. Verification wrote only this evidence artifact and made no product edit. git diff --check passed.

isolation.evidence: The inspected runner allocates a free loopback port only in 55400-55499 and a unique quantinue-test-pg name, exports that URL only to pytest, and removes its own container with trap. Before/after observation showed existing 5432 containers preserved and no product 5444 mapping. A pre-existing quantinue-test-pg container from another concurrent worker was observed before this run and was not touched.

static_path.resume_context: src/quantinue/db/postgres_query.py:42-59 selects the latest pipeline_checkpoints payload and validates it as PipelineContext; it never parses pipeline_runs.payload during resumed claim.
static_path.claim_transition: src/quantinue/db/postgres.py:116-130 finalizes stale running attempts, restores checkpoint context, and only then marks the run running.
static_path.terminal_projection: src/quantinue/db/postgres.py:230-248 intentionally stores PipelineRun in pipeline_runs.payload only after finish_run; terminal readers parse that projection separately.

limitations: The focused integration test covers one interruption dynamically. Repeated interruption was adversarially checked from the status-qualified UPDATE invariant rather than adding a temporary product test, to keep this verification read-only.
